description: Nível intermediário focado em conversação e opinião.

lessons.title: Discussing Hobbies
lessons.objective: Express interests and hobbies with more detail.
target_grammar: I have been doing... for X years
script_steps: Explain why you like a certain hobby.
Ask student to describe a hobby in 5 sentences.

lessons.title: Traveling and Plans
lessons.objective: Talk about trips and future plans.
script_steps: Ask about the student's next trip.
Simulate booking a hotel or flight.
Ask student for a 1-day travel itinerary.
